name: Rajun Cajun Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ribs into manageable portions.
2. Cook in boiling water until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Drain and cool.
4. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients for the RAJUN CAJUN SAUCE.
5. Brush the sauce over the ribs.
6. Place the ribs on grill over medium-hot heat.
7. Turn and baste often, about 10 minutes, until well glazed and hot.
8. Serves 4. More heat can be added to suit your taste by adding more Cayenne pepper.
